spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Dense and compact for POS and Dashboard, but generous p-6 to p-8 for setup wizard and standalone forms.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: Control Room Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-4 or gap-6. Dense data visibility.
spacing_and_layout.container_padding: p-6 or p-8 for borders to prevent text collision.

surfaces.pos_interface: Grid Borders (The Technical Look). Exposed skeleton. border-collapse with border-r border-b border-border/40.
surfaces.dashboard_cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border (border-border), no shadow. Hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1), subtle shadow.
surfaces.header: Solid Background with a hard bottom border for dashboard. Not glass for POS to ensure max performance and clarity.
surfaces.modals: Flat solid background with hard 1px border. No glassmorphism to keep it fast and functional.

components.buttons: Sharp edges, flat background. No soft radius. primary CTA in International Klein Blue.
components.inputs: Shadcn UI Input heavily customized. Flat, 1px solid border, 0px border radius (or max 4px).
components.tables: Shadcn Tables. High density, alternating row colors (subtle) for large catalogs.
components.pos_grid: CSS Grid for products. Fast touch targets. min-h-[100px] per item.
components.icons: lucide-react for general icons, @phosphor-icons/react for dense dashboard metrics.

images.description: Subtle, elegant abstract geometric background in light grey and white. Minimalist, swiss design, high contrast for login screen.

motion.hover_states: Crisp background color change and border darkening. Scale up very slightly for POS product buttons.
motion.transitions: Fast, max 150ms. transition: transform 0.15s ease, background-color 0.15s ease
motion.modals: Fade in with slight scale up (0.95 -> 1)

accessibility.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 contrast for all text. Especially for POS under bright lights.
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='pos-checkout-button')

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all components use .js / .jsx file extensions.
Use pure HTML + Tailwind for structural layouts like POS screen, use Shadcn for interactive logic (Dialogs, Selects, Tables).
Implement multi-tenant architecture logic clearly in context or state.
Make POS layout extremely touch-friendly on mobile/tablet (min 48px hit areas).
Use data-testid on all key interactive elements.
Ensure all text is in Spanish (e.g., Vendedor, Bodeguero, Facturación Electrónica).
